requirements.name: Government-issued photo ID
requirements.description: A driver's license, state ID, or passport for the person applying.

requirements.name: Social Security number
requirements.description: A Social Security card, or any document that shows the Social Security number for each person in your household who is applying.

requirements.name: Recent proof of income
requirements.description: Pay stubs or other proof of income from the last 30 days -- pay stubs, an employer letter, or your most recent tax return if self-employed.

requirements.name: Proof of address
requirements.description: Something that shows where you live -- a utility bill, a lease, or recent mail with your name and address.
accepts: Recent mail with your name and address

requirements.name: Self-employment business records
requirements.description: Records of your business income and expenses, such as a profit and loss statement or bank statements.
requirements.condition_note: if anyone in your household is self-employed.

requirements.name: Benefit award letters
requirements.description: Award letters or statements showing the amount and type of any benefits received.
requirements.condition_note: if anyone in your household receives disability, unemployment, child support, or other benefits.

requirements.name: Government-issued photo ID
requirements.description: A driver's license, state ID, or passport for the person applying.

requirements.name: Social Security number
requirements.description: A Social Security card, or any document that shows the Social Security number for each person in your household who is applying.

requirements.name: Recent proof of income
requirements.description: Pay stubs or other proof of income from the last 30 days -- pay stubs, an employer letter, or your most recent tax return if self-employed.

requirements.name: Proof of address
requirements.description: Something that shows where you live -- a utility bill, a lease, or recent mail with your name and address.
accepts: Recent mail with your name and address

requirements.name: Birth certificate for a child
requirements.description: A birth certificate or other document showing the child's name, date of birth, and relationship to you.
requirements.condition_note: if you are applying for a child.

requirements.name: Self-employment business records
requirements.description: Records of your business income and expenses, such as a profit and loss statement or bank statements.
requirements.condition_note: if anyone in your household is self-employed.

requirements.name: Benefit award letters
requirements.description: Award letters or statements showing the amount and type of any benefits received.
requirements.condition_note: if anyone in your household receives disability, unemployment, child support, or other benefits.

requirements.name: Government-issued photo ID
requirements.description: A driver's license, state ID, or passport for the person applying.

requirements.name: Social Security number
requirements.description: A Social Security card, or any document that shows the Social Security number for each adult in your household who is applying.

requirements.name: Recent proof of income
requirements.description: Proof of income for all household members from the last 30 days, or the prior year's tax return.

requirements.name: Most recent energy or utility bill
requirements.description: Your most recent energy or utility bill (electric, gas, or heating). This shows your account number and service address -- it is required for the application.

requirements.name: Benefit award letters
requirements.description: Award letters or statements showing the amount and type of any benefits received.
requirements.condition_note: if anyone in your household receives disability, unemployment, child support, or other benefits.

eitc.label: EITC
eitc.program_note: EITC is a tax credit you claim on your tax return when you file, not a separate application. The documents below are what you bring to your tax preparer or use to file.

requirements.name: Government-issued photo ID
requirements.description: A driver's license, state ID, or passport for the person filing.

requirements.name: Social Security numbers for you and each child you claim
requirements.description: Social Security numbers for yourself and for each child you are claiming -- this is a tax credit claimed on your return, so the IRS needs SSNs for everyone listed.

requirements.name: Earned income documents (W-2 or 1099 forms)
requirements.description: Your W-2 forms or 1099 forms showing what you earned last year. If you are self-employed, bring your Schedule SE.

requirements.name: Proof of a qualifying child (relationship and age)
requirements.description: A birth certificate or official school record that shows the child's name, date of birth, and relationship to you.
requirements.condition_note: if you are claiming a qualifying child.

requirements.name: Prior-year tax return
requirements.description: Your most recent tax return -- helpful but not required. Bring it if you have it.

residency.proof_of_address.divergence_note: CalFresh can accept a utility bill, a lease, or recent mail. If you are also applying for HEAP, use a recent energy or utility bill -- one document covers both.

identity.photo_id.divergence_note: Medi-Cal may accept a signed statement if you do not have a photo ID available. Ask your county office.

program_specific.energy_bill.divergence_note: This same energy or utility bill also works as proof of where you live for CalFresh and Medi-Cal applications, so one copy covers all three.
